message:
perf(stream): pre-allocate in-flight VecDeque and add front-ready fast path

Three improvements to BufferedStream and BufferUnorderedStream:

1. VecDeque::with_capacity(limit) for in_flight — the deque will grow
   to exactly `limit` entries during steady state, so pre-allocating
   avoids incremental reallocation during warmup.

2. Front-ready fast path — before polling the entire in-flight set,
   check if the front entry already has a resolved output (from a
   previous poll cycle that resolved it but couldn't yield because
   an earlier entry was still pending).  This skips the O(n) poll
   loop entirely when the next result is already available.

3. Early break on front resolution — when polling in-flight futures
   in order, if the front entry (index 0) becomes Ready, break
   immediately instead of continuing to poll remaining futures.
   The result will be yielded on the next iteration, and polling
   later futures would be wasted work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
